prompt:

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteEntropyCore
Target declarations: CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteEntropyCore.negMulLog_sub_mul_log_le, CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteEntropyCore.entropy_le_log_card, CausalSmith.Substrate.FiniteEntropyCore.entropy_const_eq_log_card

## Instructions
Fill the three `sorry`s in `/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/FiniteEntropyCore/Core.lean`. Do NOT change any statement, hypothesis, name, or import; do NOT add `import Mathlib.Algebra.BigOperators.Order` (it does not exist in this toolchain). Keep the existing proven decls (`entropy`, `entropy_def`, `entropy_nonneg`) intact. The file already compiles with only `sorry` warnings; after your edits it MUST compile with zero `sorry` and zero errors. Verify with the lean-lsp diagnostics tool on the file before finishing. Available facts: `Real.negMulLog_def : Real.negMulLog = fun x => -x * Real.log x`; `Real.negMulLog_nonneg : 0 ≤ x → x ≤ 1 → 0 ≤ Real.negMulLog x`; `Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos : 0 < x → Real.log x ≤ x - 1`; `Finset.sum_le_sum`, `Finset.sum_sub_distrib`, `Finset.sum_const`, `Finset.card_univ`, `Fintype.card`.

(1) `negMulLog_sub_mul_log_le {n : ℕ} (hn : 0 < n) {x : ℝ} (hx : 0 ≤ x) : Real.negMulLog x - x * Real.log n ≤ (n : ℝ)⁻¹ - x`.
Proof: `rcases eq_or_lt_of_le hx with hx0 | hx0`. Case `x = 0`: rewrite, `Real.negMulLog 0 = 0` (use `simp [Real.negMulLog]` or `Real.negMulLog_zero`), goal becomes `0 ≤ (n:ℝ)⁻¹`, close with `positivity` or `inv_nonneg.mpr (by positivity)`. Case `0 < x`: note `(n:ℝ) > 0` from `hn`. Rewrite `Real.negMulLog x = -x * Real.log x` (`Real.negMulLog_def` or `simp only [Real.negMulLog]`). The key identity: `-x * Real.log x - x * Real.log n = x * Real.log ((n*x)⁻¹)` because `Real.log ((n*x)⁻¹) = -(Real.log n + Real.log x)` (use `Real.log_inv`, `Real.log_mul (by positivity) (ne_of_gt hx0)`). Then apply `Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos` to `(n*x)⁻¹ > 0`: `Real.log ((n*x)⁻¹) ≤ (n*x)⁻¹ - 1`. Multiply by `x > 0` (use `mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left` with `le_of_lt hx0`): `x * Real.log ((n*x)⁻¹) ≤ x * ((n*x)⁻¹ - 1)`. Simplify RHS: `x * ((n*x)⁻¹ - 1) = (n:ℝ)⁻¹ - x` since `x * (n*x)⁻¹ = (n:ℝ)⁻¹` (field_simp / `mul_inv` with `x ≠ 0`, `n ≠ 0`). Chain with the identity to get the goal. A robust closing approach: establish `h := Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos (show (0:ℝ) < (n*x)⁻¹ by positivity)`, then `nlinarith`/`linarith` after providing the rewritten log term, or rewrite both sides and finish with `field_simp; nlinarith [h, ...]`. Use `nlinarith` / `linarith` liberally.

(2) `entropy_le_log_card [Nonempty α] {p : α → ℝ} (h0 : ∀ i, 0 ≤ p i) (hsum : ∑ i, p i = 1) : entropy p ≤ Real.log (Fintype.card α)`.
Let `n := Fintype.card α`. From `[Nonempty α]`, `0 < n` (`Fintype.card_pos`). Strategy: show `entropy p - Real.log n ≤ 0`. Compute `entropy p - Real.log n = ∑ i, (Real.negMulLog (p i) - p i * Real.log n)` using `Finset.sum_sub_distrib` and `∑ i, p i * Real.log n = (∑ i, p i) * Real.log n = Real.log n` (`Finset.sum_mul`, `hsum`). Bound this sum termwise by `∑ i, ((n:ℝ)⁻¹ - p i)` via `Finset.sum_le_sum` (each term: `negMulLog_sub_mul_log_le (Fintype.card_pos) (h0 i)`). Finally `∑ i, ((n:ℝ)⁻¹ - p i) = (∑ i, (n:ℝ)⁻¹) - (∑ i, p i) = n * (n:ℝ)⁻¹ - 1 = 0` (use `Finset.sum_sub_distrib`, `Finset.sum_const`, `Finset.card_univ`, `hsum`, and `mul_inv_cancel₀` with `(n:ℝ) ≠ 0`). Conclude `entropy p ≤ Real.log n` by `linarith`. Be careful with the `(Fintype.card α : ℝ)` vs `Real.log (Fintype.card α)` Nat-cast coercion; `Real.log ↑n` is the target.

(3) `entropy_const_eq_log_card [Nonempty α] : entropy (fun _ : α => (Fintype.card α : ℝ)⁻¹) = Real.log (Fintype.card α)`.
Let `n := Fintype.card α`, `0 < n` from `Nonempty`. `entropy (fun _ => (n:ℝ)⁻¹) = ∑ i, Real.negMulLog ((n:ℝ)⁻¹) = (Finset.univ.card) • Real.negMulLog ((n:ℝ)⁻¹)` via `Finset.sum_const`, `= n * Real.negMulLog ((n:ℝ)⁻¹)` (`Finset.card_univ`, `nsmul_eq_mul`). Then `Real.negMulLog ((n:ℝ)⁻¹) = -(n:ℝ)⁻¹ * Real.log ((n:ℝ)⁻¹) = (n:ℝ)⁻¹ * Real.log n` using `Real.negMulLog_def` and `Real.log_inv`. So the product is `n * ((n:ℝ)⁻¹ * Real.log n) = Real.log n` via `mul_inv_cancel₀ ((n:ℝ) ≠ 0)`. Use `simp [entropy, Real.negMulLog, Real.log_inv, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ]` then `field_simp`/`ring`-style cleanup, finishing with the cancellation. Provide `(n:ℝ) ≠ 0` from `Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (Nat.pos_iff.mp Fintype.card_pos).ne'` or `(by positivity)`.

Work only inside Core.lean. Use `lean_multi_attempt` / `lean_goal` to iterate on tactic blocks, and run `lean_diagnostic_messages` on the final file to confirm no errors and no `sorry` remain.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a SHORT plain-text report: which decls you closed, which remain, and any blocker. No JSON required.
